title: News on Docs: Gemini Upgrades and Comparisons
description: Recent reports discuss Google Docs updates and comparisons with Microsoft Word.

sections.heading: Google Docs Gemini Upgrade
paragraphs: According to Chrome Unboxed, Google Docs is receiving a significant upgrade involving Gemini. This update reportedly includes support for 11 new languages.

sections.heading: AI Pro Rollout
paragraphs: Jetstream.blog published information regarding the Google AI Pro rollout in the US. The report, dated July 16, 2026, focuses on what is new in Gemini Spark.

sections.heading: Microsoft Word vs. Google Docs
paragraphs: BGR has highlighted four disadvantages of using Microsoft Word instead of Google Docs in a recent article.

sections.heading: Search Interest Data
paragraphs: Data indicates that the search term 'docs' has a lower bound of 2000 searches in the AU region.

faq.a: According to BGR, there are four disadvantages to using Microsoft Word instead of Google Docs.
